title: Dense Bi-Encoder Retrieval and Domain Transfer · Program Brief: Rag Biencoder Offline Online
summary: A semantic search prototype embeds queries and documents identically without checking model instructions, returns top five from a large corpus, and has never tested domain or language transfer. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the biencoder offline online increment in dense retrieval candidate service. Learne…
objectives: Separate offline document encoding from online query encoding while preserving one versioned bi-encoder space.
Test negation, numbers, identifiers, rare terms, domain drift, multilingual queries, bias, and adversarial proximity as separate embedding limitations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example RAG engineering team handles case 6747 during an enterprise retrieval migration canary. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate dense retrieval on one embedding space, candidate recall, domain, and language evidence; record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate offline document encoding from online query encoding while preserving one versioned bi-encoder space. A defensible solution applies Rag Biencoder Offline Online, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to dense retrieval candidate service.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-dense-retrieval-4
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-dense-retrieval-4.
# Case 1655: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def worked_rag_dense_retrieval_4(query_model: str = "retriever-v4", document_model: str = "retriever-v4", candidate_count: int = 50, relevant_rank: int = 4, domain_evaluated: bool = True, multilingual_evaluated: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "corpusworked4",
        "query4dekrow",
        "tenant1655",
        "indexworked41655",
        "prompt4dekrow1655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if query_model != document_model:
        return False, 0, "model-space-mismatch"
    if candidate_count <= 0 or relevant_rank < 1 or relevant_rank > candidate_count:
        return False, relevant_rank, "candidate-rank"
    if not domain_evaluated:
        return False, relevant_rank, "domain-transfer"
    if not multilingual_evaluated:
        return False, relevant_rank, "language-transfer"
    recall_proxy = candidate_count - relevant_rank + 1
    assert recall_proxy > 0
    return True, recall_proxy, "dense-candidates"

steps.title: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Biencoder Offline Online model · Theory Rag Biencoder Offline Online
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Rag Biencoder Offline Online: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory RAG engineering team handles case 4937 during an incident-response knowledge search. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate dense retrieval on one embedding space, candidate recall, domain, and language evidence; retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity; then change tenant, language, date, and document version and reject stale or unauthorized evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate offline document encoding from online query encoding while preserving one versioned bi-encoder space.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Biencoder Offline Online model · Theory Rag Biencoder Offline Online.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Biencoder Offline Online model · Theory Rag Biencoder Offline Online, keep Rag Biencoder Offline Online connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Separate offline document encoding from online query encoding while preserving one versioned bi-encoder space.

Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only.
